AI.rationale: NVDA Q1 FY26 $44B (+69% YoY) on Blackwell ramp, $4.5B H20 charge but Q2 guide $45B; MSFT Azure +33%, $80B FY25 capex reaffirmed; GOOGL Cloud +28%, Gemini 2.5 across 500M users. H20 export ban a geopolitical risk but not interrupting capex.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q1 $123M (+32% YoY), Q2 guide $130-140M; Neutron Stage 2 qualification + outer shell tests done May 16; Neutron entered NSSL Phase 3 Lane 1 (up to $5.6B contracts).

robotics.rationale: No material BOTZ or constituent news surfaced in May 2025 lookback from curated or open sources. Background growth thesis intact but no near-term catalyst. Insufficient signal for directional call.

engineered_biology.rationale: Prime Medicine first-ever prime-editing clinical data May 19 (PM359 CGD, 58-66% NADPH restoration); FDA new 'plausible mechanism' pathway for N-of-1 gene therapies (May). Real scientific milestones, no commercial revenue at scale yet.

quantum.rationale: MSFT Majorana 1 Feb 2025 with scientific skepticism; D-Wave surge May 20 boosting QTUM; IBM/Google/IonQ refreshed roadmaps. Speculative momentum, pre-commercial revenue.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: IEA: data center electricity +17% in 2025; SMR offtake pipeline grew from 25 GW to 45 GW. Fusion still pre-commercial — no grid-connected fusion electricity. NUKZ exposure primarily fission utilities + SMR.

general_markets.rationale: Fed held 3.50-3.75% April 29; gold $3,278 end-May (+26% YTD on tariffs/safe-haven); 10Y at 4.41%.
